name: ANDROS QUEEN
text: ANDROS QUEEN is underway at 13 knots near Rafina, heading west.

name: WRATH II
text: WRATH II is underway at 6 knots near 2 km off Agistri (Skala), heading northeast.

name: PAPA
text: PAPA (pleasure) is underway at 14 knots near open water (37.215, 23.570), heading west. Reported destination: SPETSES.

text: ASH BALTIC is underway at 11 knots near open water (37.254, 23.870), heading southwest.
